data.title: Veritone to Hold First Quarter 2026 Results Conference Call on May 12th
data.description: Veritone, Inc., a top player in enterprise AI and data solutions, disclosed its first quarter 2026 financial results conference call schedule. The call is set for Tuesday, May 12, 2026, at 8:30 a.m. ET (5:30 a.m. PT). During the call, they will cover the first quarter's outcomes, give an overview of the company's status, and engage in a Q&A session. Those interested can join the conference call or tune in live.

data.title: Aven Launches Bitcoin-Backed Credit Card
data.description: The new Aven Bitcoin Visa Card, introduced by Aven, a prominent machine-banking platform offering asset-backed credit cards, presents fixed-rate loans that can extend up to 10 years. This card also offers unlimited cash back benefits. Released in Las Vegas on April 27, 2026, this credit card is unique as it is backed by bitcoin, providing users with innovative financial flexibility and security. This new offering aims to revolutionize traditional credit card structures by allowing users to borrow against and leverage their bitcoin holdings for extended periods while enjoying cash back rewards without limits.

data.title: Logitech Appoints Robin Piispanen as Global Head of Logitech G
data.description: Logitech International made a significant announcement today appointing Robin Piispanen as the Global Head of Logitech G, the company's gaming division, effective May 4, 2026. Piispanen takes over from Ujesh Desai, who has been leading the division globally since 2014 and is retiring as planned. With nearly 20 years of experience at Logitech and a background as a former professional gamer, Piispanen's transition to this role marks a pivotal moment for the company. This announcement resonates well given Logitech's financial standing, trading as (SIX: LOGN) and (Nasdaq: LOGI).

data.title: Amkor Tech discloses Q1 2026 financials.
data.description: A recent report indicates that the global population has reached approximately 7.8 billion people. This represents a significant increase compared to previous years. The report also highlights a decrease in global poverty rates, with approximately 689 million people living in extreme poverty, a decline from previous figures. Additionally, it notes that access to clean water has improved, with around 785 million people gaining access to improved water sources. The report underscores the importance of continued efforts to address global challenges and ensure a better quality of life for all individuals worldwide.

data.title: Kforce Reports First Quarter 2026 Revenue of $330.4 Million; Returns to Year-over-Year Growth
data.description: In Tampa, Florida, Kforce Inc. (NYSE: KFRC), a company specializing in technology and professional staffing services, revealed its first-quarter 2026 outcomes. Joseph J. Liberatore, the President and Chief Executive Officer, expressed satisfaction with the results surpassing revenue and profitability projections. The company's strong performance signifies a successful start to the year, indicating positive momentum.

data.title: Cadence releases Q1 2026 financial results with record revenue and profit growth.
data.description: During the recent government press conference, it was disclosed that the unemployment rate in the country has reached 7.8%, which is a significant increase from the previous quarter. The number of jobless individuals is now at 2.3 million, marking a concerning trend. The finance minister also announced a new stimulus package of $15 billion to support small businesses and industries affected by the economic downturn. Additionally, the government plans to allocate $5 million for job training programs to help the unemployed population reskill and find new employment opportunities. These measures are being implemented to address the growing unemployment crisis and stabilize the economy.

data.title: Solaris Energy Infrastructure reports Q1 2026 results, updated guidance, and third long-term contract with global tech firm.
data.description: A recent study reveals that the unemployment rate in the country has significantly dropped to 4.2%, the lowest it has been in seven years. This marks a decrease of 1.5% from the previous year. The report also highlights a growth in job creation, with over 300,000 new jobs added in the past quarter. Furthermore, it shows that the average income has risen by 3.7% compared to last year, reaching a record high of $56,000. Experts attribute this positive trend to various government initiatives aimed at boosting the economy and creating employment opportunities.

data.title: Flowserve to Participate in Upcoming Investor Conferences
data.description: Dallas-based Flowserve Corporation (NYSE: FLS) revealed its involvement in upcoming investor conferences. The company's Investor Relations team will partake in investor meetings at the Oppenheimer Industrial Growth Conference on May 5. Furthermore, Senior Vice President and Chief Financial Officer, Amy Schwetz, will engage in investor meetings and a fireside chat at the BofA Securities Industrials on May 12.

data.title: CBNK Continues Strong Growth With Accelerated Investment Underway
data.description: In Rockville, Maryland, on April 27, 2026, Capital Bancorp, Inc. announced its financial results. The company, listed as CBNK on the NASDAQ, serves as the holding entity for Capital Bank, N.A. Within this report, important figures such as revenue, profits, and any significant developments within the bank are typically disclosed.

data.title: Arbor Realty Trust Schedules First Quarter 2026 Earnings Conference Call
data.description: Arbor Realty Trust, Inc. (NYSE: ABR) from Uniondale, N.Y., revealed its plan to unveil its financial performance for the first quarter of 2026 on May 8, 2026, before the market opens. The company has slated a conference call to discuss the results at 10:00 a.m. Eastern Time on the same day. This disclosure was made on April 27, 2026.

data.title: Bed Bath & Beyond, Inc. Delivers First Significant Revenue Growth in 19 Quarters on a Materially Lower Cost Base, Driving Improved Profitability
data.description: Bed Bath & Beyond, Inc. (NYSE:BBBY), based in Murray, Utah, released its financial report for the first quarter ending on March 31, 2026. The company, which owns Bed Bath & Beyond, Overstock, buybuy BABY, Kirkland’s, Kirkland's Home brands, and a blockchain asset portfolio, recorded a net revenue of $248 million for the first quarter of 2026, marking a 6.9% growth compared to the previous year. This figure excludes the impact of the company's exit from Canada.

data.title: Joe Hand Promotions Continues to Offer the Best in Boxing for Cinco de Mayo Weekend
data.description: In Philadelphia, Joe Hand Promotions (JHP), the leading distributor of live sports to the commercial market, is showcasing its expertise in combat sports by distributing a premium fight card for the fourth consecutive year on Cinco de Mayo weekend. Known for its high-quality events, JHP will present a stacked lineup on Saturday, May 2, to celebrate the Mexican holiday. This event attracts numerous boxing fans and viewers, making it one of the busiest weekends in the boxing industry. JHP's commitment to delivering top-notch entertainment is evident in this annual tradition.

data.title: Bed Bath & Beyond Appoints Kyla Robinson to Lead Technology Transformation Across “Everything Home”
data.description: Bed Bath & Beyond, Inc. revealed the appointment of Kyla Robinson as the Chief Technology Transformation Officer. Robinson will report to President Amy Sullivan and spearhead the creation of an intelligence layer to enhance business operations. The company has integrated various components over the past two years, such as retail, home services, financial products, and expanding brand collection under one umbrella. This strategic move aims to consolidate and strengthen the company's market position.

data.title: Outset Medical to Report First Quarter 2026 Financial Results on Thursday, May 7, 2026
data.description: Outset Medical, Inc., based in San Jose, California, disclosed on April 27, 2026, that they will be reporting financial performance for the first quarter of 2026 after the market closes on May 7, 2026. The company, listed on Nasdaq as OM, specializes in medical technology and has introduced an innovative technology aimed at enhancing dialysis outcomes while reducing expenses and simplifying procedures. This announcement highlights its commitment to transparency and shareholder relations.

data.title: Crescent Capital BDC, Inc. Schedules Earnings Release and Conference Call to Discuss its First Quarter Ended March 31, 2026 Financial Results
data.description: On April 27, 2026, Crescent Capital BDC, Inc. (NASDAQ: CCAP) revealed plans to disclose its financial outcomes for the initial quarter concluding on March 31, 2026, after market close on May 13, 2026. The company extended an invitation to all concerned parties to join its webcast/conference call on May 14, 2026, at 12:00 p.m. Eastern Time to delve into the financial results for the mentioned quarter.

data.title: WEBTOON Entertainment Inc. to Report First Quarter 2026 Financial Results on May 11, 2026
data.description: On April 27, 2026, WEBTOON Entertainment Inc. (Nasdaq: WBTN) disclosed its intention to unveil the financial outcomes for the initial quarter of 2026 post-market closure on May 11, 2026. WEBTOON Entertainment, a prominent global entertainment enterprise housing major storytelling platforms, will hold a conference call at 4:30 p.m. ET led by its management team to discuss these results.

data.title: Results of Operations for the Year Ended December 31, 2025 - American Overseas Group Limited Announces Net Income Of $10.8 Million For the Year Ended December 31, 2025
data.description: In Hamilton, Bermuda, on April 27, 2026, American Overseas Group Limited (BSX: AORE.BH) (Pink Sheets: AOREF.PK), also known as AOG, announced a consolidated net income available to common shareholders of $10.8 million for the year ending on December 31, 2025. This translates to $230.44 per diluted share. In comparison, the company reported a consolidated net income available to common shareholders of $9.4 million, or $200.09 per diluted share, for the year ended December 31, 2024. The book value per weighted share as of December 31, 2025, stood at $1,241.71, marking an increase from the previous year's figure of $976.60 per weighted share at December 31, 2024.

data.title: Greenlight Capital Re, Ltd. Schedules First Quarter 2026 Financial Results and Conference Call
data.description: In Grand Cayman, Cayman Islands, on April 27, 2026, Greenlight Capital Re, Ltd. (NASDAQ: GLRE), a multiline property and casualty insurer and reinsurer, shared plans to unveil its financial results for the first quarter concluding on March 31, 2026. The disclosure is scheduled post-market closure on Tuesday, May 5, 2026. Further, a live conference call to analyze these results is set for Wednesday, May 6, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. Eastern Time.

data.title: Structure Therapeutics to Present Aleniglipron, Amylin and Combination Data at the American Diabetes Association 86th Scientific Sessions
data.description: On April 27, 2026, Structure Therapeutics Inc. revealed that they will showcase various developments at the American Diabetes Association 86th Scientific Sessions occurring from June 5–8, 2026, in New Orleans, Louisiana. The company, listed as NASDAQ: GPCR, specializes in innovative oral small molecule therapeutics for metabolic conditions like obesity. Among the presentations, a highlight will be the discussion on the findings from the ACCESS Phase 2b clinical trial of aleniglipron.
Hanover Bancorp, Inc. sees Q1 2026 progress with margin expansion and announces $0.10 quarterly cash dividend.
